message.content: The screenshot shows a mobile website for "Advologos," a legal branding and digital presence service. The dark-themed page features a header with the brand name, a "CONTATO" (Contact) button, and a menu icon. A prominent section highlights "BRANDING & PRESENÇA DIGITAL JURÍDICA" (Legal Branding & Digital Presence) with the headline "Marcas jurídicas com presença, clareza e autoridade" (Legal brands with presence, clarity, and authority). Below, text explains how Advologos structures a law firm’s perception. A privacy notice at the bottom includes cookie consent buttons ("ACEITAR TODOS" and "SOMENTE NECESSÁRIOS") and a notification badge showing "1 Issue."
